ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Mood Diary needs microphone access to record voice notes when you use that feature.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mood Diary accesses your photo library only when you save an emotion review image.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Mood Diary saves your emotion review image to your photo library when you tap Save.
ios.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Mood Diary uses Face ID to protect your emotion diary and private data.
